Bloodstained Mantle  
 


Slot: SHOULDERS
AC: 6
STR: +3
SV MAGIC: +10
WT: 3.5 Size: SMALL
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Bloodstained Mantle

Slot: SHOULDERS
AC: 6
STR: +3
SV MAGIC: +10
WT: 3.5 Size: SMALL
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:20 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:42
Lucy Entry By:Tiana
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-12 22:50:55
Page Updated:Sun Nov 17th, 2019

Expansion: Original
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 28
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Estate of Unrest
NPC Name
an undead knight of Unrest
The Fabled Undead Knight of Unrest


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Estate of Unrest
Common drop, rare is Bloodstained Tunic.


Uploaded January 11th, 2023 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
Excellent SvM for the money
QuoteReply
# Jul 23 2002 at 4:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759392552
Scholar
627 posts
or effort to get it. I purchased it for 75pp on The Nameless in the EC tunnel. I switched from the Drolvarg Mantle to this. I lose a few ac and SvF but the 10SvM is worth it. I'm fighting at SolB currently and having SvM over 40 definately helps resist the kobold shammy spells (slow, root, etc)
▲ Page top
RE: Excellent SvM for the money
QuoteReply
# Nov 02 2003 at 8:51 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760234493
51 posts
Funny, I did almost the same thing. However, I did it for the +3 STR instead of the +6 AGI. The SvM helps too, it puts me over 50. Oh, and I didn't buy it, just looted it in Unrest. Fun, fun, fun!!!

Edited, Sun Nov 2 08:52:37 2003
▲ Page top
Easily achieved
QuoteReply
# Jul 07 2002 at 4:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759517522
21 posts
This is a great item for pvp for a few reasons. One reason being that it is so easy to get. You can either buy it for anywhere under 100pp, or if you are around 30 you can get it to drop off the undead knight in unrest without any problems. It almost drops every time. This item is good for many levels, because there arent a lot of better shoulders you can get at affordable prices until the higher levels. All in all- a great pvp item, dispensible, and affordable.
▲ Page top
BS Mantle
QuoteReply
# Apr 15 2002 at 10:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253547183
3 posts
As a newly made blackguard and on pvp server I can tell you this little item is a lifesaver. I snagged mine at lvl 20 and havent stopped wearing it since. I switch off to more ac shoulders if I need.I resist a lot of mr based spells but the other guy is right at higher end its HR and CR that make or break you. LOL see how many IC you can eat w/ low CR. Or live thru 2 or 3 lures and then talk to me.
Personally I am going after the Vex Xi Vius a nifty new item for range it offers way more resist than the good ole RBF and is pretty common drop. Add the mantle up w/ BD jewlery, a decient head piece, the ranged item and you in business

See you all in the funny papers !

Desdmona Shadowborn
Female Blackguard and STILL Loveing It!!
Knights Errant
RZ

▲ Page top
Also Dropped in Najena
QuoteReply
# Feb 21 2002 at 2:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591754229774
13 posts
I looted this off a Magician just last night while searching for the Dark Circlet for the Crafted armor quest. Not only did I get the Mantle, but the Bloodstained Boots, Pants and Coif as well. (Not bad for a 4 hour Raid)
BTW, all the items were dropped from Greater Skeletons and the Magicians. (possibly the necromancers but they mostly dropped cloth stuff)

So head over to the most underused Dungeon in the game. I am planning a revisit again tonight. =)
▲ Page top
Magic resist
QuoteReply
# Feb 20 2002 at 4:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760954660
View User Forum
19 posts
I rate this I item as underated because I did not know how important resist are as a main tank I when playing against caster mobs they try to cast walking sleep and such on me but are resisted and when it does hit is only for short periods. Do u need uber resist at lower levels no but it helps to increase it from base levels. Also I had been charmed twice before I bought this none after. the magic resist on this item is the potatoes and the str is the gravy.


Banlron Sharpeblade
level 35 warriior
Mithaniel Marr
▲ Page top
nice
QuoteReply
# Feb 08 2002 at 8:27 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591771853151
153 posts
I just bought it off of a vendor in FV for 127pp. Overpaid? Absolutely. Did I mind? Nope. I'll gladly give 127pp for a +3 increase to my STR. All day, Everyday.

Fluxus
Rogue-30th
Tarew Marr.
▲ Page top
Lil Info
QuoteReply
# Jan 30 2002 at 2:35 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592252387527
13 posts
Hi, Magic Resist is well mmm kinda useless. Only reason i am posting here is b/c you think at higher lvl's we need MR no we don't higher lvls it's Cold and Fire resist. You go to ToV with a shi* load of MR asnd see if you don't die fast lol. Mostly all dradons either cast Fire/Cold basted Spells/AE's.

Miroh Tsu'Tsuruden
55th Seasonal Human/Epic Master
Nameless
▲ Page top
RE: Lil Info
QuoteReply
# Jun 25 2002 at 10:37 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759392552
Scholar
627 posts
It all depends on the mobs/area you fight in. SvC and SvF can be useless in some areas and important in others.
▲ Page top
RE: Lil Info
QuoteReply
# Mar 11 2002 at 9:05 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591761796382
63 posts
you can say that because you don't play on a PvP server =/ MR/PR/DR/CR/FR is needed more than int/wis/str/agi/cha/dex/sta when you are PvPing a caster/hybrid...ok well, maybe not more than all of those, but resists are still DAMNED important tks.
▲ Page top
Hmm
QuoteReply
# Aug 07 2001 at 2:10 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591758644668
157 posts
I think some people here miss the point of this item at higher levels, one you get MR for this and the same MR as Imbued granites, but since IBS are RARE (not ultra, but still). And cost a fortune. And not only that this piece is cheap and easy to get. But IBS are better then these cuz they have 10resist all.

Hope you are willing to wait a long time to hunt that... The RS Shoulders require a 2-3 groups of level 50+ to get. It's easier to get the Skyshrine Rogue shoulders.

sorry about all those spelling erros ill re-do hear

a rather good item for its price
